analyze: Set M (generated pod-side by make_ensemble_scans.py once the md_cage MD reaches >= 3000 steps) discards the first 1000 MD steps as equilibration, takes 10 snapshots evenly spaced over the remainder, and for each writes 7 SCF Na delta scans (delta = -0.45..+0.45 A step 0.15) with the water frozen at the snapshot coordinates and the exact set-G electronic settings. Compare the resulting ensemble of E(delta) curves against the rigid-cage set-G curve (results_extra/jobs_extra/Na_s3hyd_c9.9_d*) and the adiabatic set-J minimum (results_mobile).
